author: driver--design-phase-4a-render-md-0c67
content: Completed: Implemented vitreous_render crate with full GPU rendering pipeline. 6 Rust source files (commands.rs, atlas.rs, pipeline.rs, damage.rs, diff.rs, lib.rs) + 4 WGSL shaders (rect SDF, text, image, shadow). 60 tests passing, clippy clean, fmt clean. Covers all 10 requirements: RenderCommand enum, wgpu pipeline types, glyph atlas with shelf packing, image cache, stencil clipping, damage tracking, frame diffing, SDF rounded rects, draw call batching, and the full frame pipeline. Commit 201b953.
